title: NextAction
description: Versioned action grammar emitted by the next-action resolver (Era 003). Schema version 1.

action.description: The action the resolver recommends. Closed set for HARNESS001–HARNESS005; open-ended by design — later phases add values without breaking consumers.

scalar.description: Action-specific payload string (e.g. story ID for spawn actions, empty string for done/await-user).

model.description: Model override for auto-resolved spawn actions only. Null for checkpoint, await-user, and done.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this action was chosen.

meta.description: Structured metadata. Always carries schema_version. All other fields are optional.

schema_version.description: Integer version of this action grammar. Must equal 1 for Era 003.

gate.description: Gate name that caused a block (e.g. 'context-budget', 'auth-gate').

warnings.description: Advisory messages for the orchestrator. Non-blocking.
